top_findings.summary: The skill requests access to Bash shell execution and broad file system access tools (Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob) for a stated purpose of analyzing implementation plans and updating specifications. While some file operations are necessary for documentation work, the inclusion of unrestricted Bash access combined with no workspace restrictions or safety boundaries creates significant overreach risk. The skill could perform arbitrary system operations, modify any files, or execute commands far beyond simple specification analysis. This represents classic permission overreach where a document analysis tool requests system-level execution privileges.
